overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Subnautica showing underwater exploration in a deep bioluminescent biome. The player swims through green-lit waters with ghostrays, transitions through rocky areas with glowing flora, and encounters a massive Ghost Leviathan in the dark depths.

scene_state.functional_zone: open deep water with bioluminescent fauna

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through green-lit water observing ghostrays swimming nearby

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostray swimming in circular patterns around the player

entered.detail: translucent blue manta-like creatures with glowing red eyes and wing-like fins
murky green underwater environment with floating particulate matter
dark silhouetted rock formations visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The player swims through open deep water illuminated by a green ambient light. Translucent ghostrays with glowing red eyes circle around the player while the flashlight illuminates floating particles in the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky underwater cave with bioluminescent flora

events.description: entering rocky cave area with bioluminescent plants from open water

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow rocky passages with glowing blue flora on the walls

entered.detail: jagged dark rock walls and outcroppings surrounding the passage
clusters of glowing blue spherical plants attached to rock surfaces

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from open water into a semi-enclosed rocky cave. The green water gives way to darker rocky walls covered in glowing blue bioluminescent flora. The ghostrays retreat into the distance as the environment becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense bioluminescent forest with abandoned structure wreckage

events.description: approaching abandoned structure with orange lights embedded in rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: swimming over rocky terrain examining dense bioluminescent flora and wreckage debris

entered.detail: derelict base structure with glowing orange lights and scattered metal debris
thick clusters of glowing blue-white coral formations covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The player navigates through a densely vegetated underwater area with thick clusters of bioluminescent coral. An abandoned structure with orange lights appears on the left, partially embedded in the rocky terrain, while the ghostrays are no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dark water with massive leviathan creature

events.description: massive Ghost Leviathan emerges from darkness in the distance
player slows swimming speed to observe the leviathan passing by

agents.ego_description: holding position while watching the massive Ghost Leviathan swim gracefully past the player

notable_agents.action: massive translucent serpentine Ghost Leviathan with glowing blue body swimming past the player

entered.detail: enormous translucent serpentine creature with glowing blue internal organs and red eyes

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into dark water where a massive Ghost Leviathan emerges from the blackness. The enormous translucent serpentine creature swims past the player, its body glowing with bioluminescent blue light, while the rocky terrain and flora fade into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, green-lit aquatic expanse into the claustrophobic depths of a bioluminescent cavern. It begins in deep water illuminated by a green ambient glow, where translucent ghostrays with glowing red eyes circle the camera amidst floating particles. As the player swims forward, the open water gradually gives way to a semi-enclosed rocky cave, causing the ghostrays to retreat into the distance. The scene then shifts from the green haze to a darker environment, where the rocky walls become covered in glowing blue bioluminescent flora.

The shot follows a continuous underwater journey that transitions from a lush, bioluminescent garden into the terrifying void of the deep ocean. It begins by navigating through dense clusters of glowing coral and thick vegetation, passing an abandoned structure with flickering orange lights embedded in the rocky terrain. As the camera moves forward, the vibrant flora and rocky walls gradually recede, giving way to an expansive stretch of dark, empty water. The scene then shifts dramatically as a massive, translucent Ghost Leviathan emerges from the blackness, its serpentine body glowing with a cold blue light as it glides past the viewer.
